name: dod-guard
description: Anti-cheat Definition of Done verification with locked proofs and a structured interview skill for requirements gathering.

plugins.name: dod-guard
plugins.description: Lock DoD proofs in MCP storage with anti-cheat verification. Ships 8 skills: /interview, /quality-upgrade, /test-verification, /test-fixer, /ratchet, /clean-house, /step-by-step (multi-step sequential execution with 2 specialized agents), and /cheap-step (host formulates specs, cheap workers implement, host verifies — step-by-step at 20% the cost).
